title: Xtra Smoky Venezuelan Taleggio Empanadas
description: A garlicky, fluffy, midnight-craving Venezuelan dish featuring Taleggio cheese, smoky heat, and a kosher-friendly recipe, cooked to perfection on a salt block.
instructions: Preheat the salt block in the oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the softened Taleggio cheese to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Gradually add the beaten egg and water to the dough, mixing until a smooth consistency is achieved.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape using a rolling pin.
Place a tablespoon of the remaining Taleggio cheese in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the cheese to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Place the empanadas on the preheated salt block and bake for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve the empanadas hot and enjoy.
